tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: Cancer Survivor Cheers UNC at College World Series, Reunited With Players Who Stood by Him
stories.summary: Six-year-old leukemia survivor David Hill watches UNC play in the College World Series in Omaha, reunited with baseball players who visited him during chemotherapy.

stories.headline: Cape Verdean Goalkeeper's Mother Gets U.S. Visa to Watch Her Son Play After His Stunning Debut
stories.summary: A 40-year-old goalkeeper becomes a sensation with seven saves against Spain; the U.S. State Department helps his mother get a visa to see him play.

stories.headline: Lost Engagement Ring Found After 10 Years, Returned by Plumbing Crew to Its Grateful Owner
stories.summary: After 10 years lost down a toilet, Carol Oram's engagement ring—which she received in 1965—surfaces, sparking joyful tears when she finally slips it back on.

stories.headline: Halifax Teen Rallies Knitters to Create 80+ Hats for Newborns at Local Hospital
stories.summary: Inspired by a donated hat for his baby brother, a Grade 10 student connected local knitters to make handmade gifts for hospitalized newborns.

stories.headline: Man Living With HIV Receives World's First Lung Transplant From HIV-Positive Donor
stories.summary: Turkey's Lake Tuz welcomes approximately 5,000 flamingo chicks—more than double last year—after nearly vanishing from drought five years ago.

stories.headline: Lake Tuz Roars Back: 5,000 Flamingo Chicks Hatch in Turkey's Climate Recovery
stories.summary: Nearly destroyed by drought, Turkey's Lake Tuz now welcomes more than double last year's flamingo chicks—a stunning symbol of ecological resilience.

stories.headline: 24-Year-Old Runner Crosses Sri Lanka in 6 Days, Raises $27,000 for Childhood Cancer Research
stories.summary: A 24-year-old ultra-runner completes a 566-kilometer journey across Sri Lanka in 6 days, raising $27,000 for childhood cancer research.

stories.headline: Nine Rehabilitated Sea Turtles Return to the Atlantic as Crowds Cheer Them Home
stories.summary: Nine cold-stunned sea turtles named after Baltimore neighborhoods—St. Paul, Fells Point, Glen, and others—swam back into the Atlantic as hundreds cheered from Ocean City's beach.

stories.headline: Undergraduate Cracks 100-Year-Old Math Problem, Could Reshape Wind Turbine Design
stories.summary: Penn State student Divya Tyagi solved a century-old aerodynamics equation, enabling wind turbines to operate at maximum efficiency.

stories.headline: 13-Year-Old Delivers $10K in Toys and Cheer Baskets to Ronald McDonald House Families
stories.summary: Thirteen-year-old Hannalee Wilbur delivered $10,000 worth of wrapped gifts to Ronald McDonald House families as her Bat Mitzvah project, inspired by her cousins' stay there.

stories.headline: Boulder Hiker Has Given Away 2,200 Custom Hats on His Favorite Mountain
stories.summary: Curtis Jones has given away over 2,200 custom hats to Boulder hikers on Mt. Sanitas, spending his entire $72,000 retirement bonus on spreading joy one cap at a time.

stories.headline: Athletics Rally From 7 Down to Beat Angels in Epic 10-Inning Comeback
stories.summary: Pinch-hitter Jonah Heim's two-out ninth-inning homer sparked the Athletics' stunning comeback from seven runs down to beat the Angels 12-11 in 10 innings.

stories.headline: Rare Beetle Species Returns to Ohio After 75-Year Absence, Thanks to Cincinnati Zoo
stories.summary: The excerpt provided does not contain information about the rare beetle species returning to Ohio; unable to rewrite summary.

stories.headline: World's First Commercial Green Hydrogen Ship Sets Sail, Proving Clean Shipping Works
stories.summary: Lithuania's Port of Klaipėda launched the Rasa, a 42-meter commercial tanker running entirely on locally-made green hydrogen with zero diesel fuel aboard.

stories.headline: New Platform Compresses Cancer Drug Discovery From Weeks to Just Four Hours
stories.summary: Purdue researchers Nicolás Morato and R. Graham Cooks created a mass spectrometry platform that compresses cancer drug discovery from weeks to just four hours.
